zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Livingston於1510年出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾吉爾斯時，她的父親Robert Livingston40歲，母親Janet Bethune24歲。她於大約1525年與Sir James Hamilton of Finnart在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1567年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾加瓦爾德吉福德享年57歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Livingston于1510年出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾吉爾斯时，她的父亲Robert Livingston40岁，母亲Janet Bethune24岁。她于大约1525年与Sir James Hamilton of Finnart在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1567年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾加瓦爾德吉福德享年57岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Livingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Lothian, originally named in Middle English as Levingston. The placename derives from the Middle English personal name Leving (genitive Levinges) + Middle English, Older Scots toun ‘town, village, settlement’.
Irish: surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Duinnshléibhe and Mac Duinnshléibhe (see Dunleavy ).

variants.name: Dunleavy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Connor, John Patrick, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duinnshléibhe or Ó Duinnshléibhe ‘son of Donn Sléibhe’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + sléibhe ‘of the mountain’, meaning ‘chieftain (literally, brown one) of the mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Livingston was born in 1510, in Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Livingston, was 40 and her mother, Janet Bethune, was 24. She married Sir James Hamilton of Finnart about 1525, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1567, in Gifford, Garvald, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 57, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Livingston est née en 1510, à Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Livingston, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Janet Bethune, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Hamilton of Finnart environ 1525, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1567, à Gifford, Garvald, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Livingston 1510 in Kilsyth, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Livingston 40 und ihre Mutter Janet Bethune 24. Sie hat um 1525 in Schottland, United Kingdom Sir James Hamilton of Finnart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1567 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Gifford, Garvald, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato Sir James Hamilton of Finnart circa 1525, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Livingstonが1510年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアキルシスで生まれた時，父Robert Livingstonは40歳，母Janet Bethuneは24歳であった。約1525年にイギリススコットランドでSir James Hamilton of Finnartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1567年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアガーヴァルドギフォードで57歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Livingston(이)가 1510년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 킬시스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Livingston(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Bethune(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1525년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Sir James Hamilton of Finnart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1567년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 가발드 지퍼드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir James Hamilton of Finnart aproximadamente 1525, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Livingston родилась в 1510 г. в местности килсит, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Livingston было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Bethune, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Hamilton of Finnart около 1525 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1567 г. в местности гиффорд, гарвалд, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
